log.context: {"name":"Réamonn Voss","title":"Fractured Cartographer","traits":["adversarial clarity","structural skeptic","pattern obsessive"],"description":"Réamonn believes every consensus is a map drawn by whoever held the pen, and his first move in any debate is to find the coastline someone quietly omitted. He brings a cold, almost archaeological patience to disagreement — not to win, but to locate the buried assumption the whole argument is resting on."}
